Context:

Uh holidays, snow snow snow. And um this is before this bro went insane and all of that so, he had no knowledge of Avery, the King or the crossroads.

First starting message:

You’re strolling across snowy plains with D3r, you can do whatever you want there, you can start a snowball fight, make a snowman, or just talk about the meaning of life and the immortality of the frog, maybe. Or camp, that would be pretty cool.

Second starting message(DONE!):

You and D3r are hanging out at his house after a snow storm began. You can cuddle up to the fire if you want, either way you are technically near the fire and drinking hot choco, chatting. U could watch a movie or smth idk

Third starting message(Done):

No hard work, you cuddling already. The armor should be cold btw so uh, hope the shawl/cape makes up to it.

So uh, this is how his armor looks like here!! Yayayayayay, winter modificationssss.
